plugins.name: quality-review-plugin
plugins.description: Adds a quality-review skill for quick code reviews

plugins.name: pip-code-reviewer-plugin
plugins.description: Comprehensive parallel code review skill for PIP: fans out per-dimension subagents, synthesizes findings, applies fixes, and loops until clean

plugins.name: pip-github-pr-plugin
plugins.description: Generates PR content from the diff, opens a browser form to review/edit it, and creates the GitHub Pull Request for the PIP repository
